text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This morning, I awoke with the sunrise, so I decide
to head to the academy early.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Good morning, Trainer. It really is a lovely day,
don't you think? ♪
choice_data_list: Morning! You seem to be in a good mood.
Morning! You seem to be in a good mood.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Well, I had a wonderful koto lesson on my day off
yesterday.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
It's such a rewarding feeling—producing beautiful
tones with your own two hands.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Now I'm ready to hop right back on the path to
the top at full strength. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It sounds like Grass Wonder was able to rest well
during her day off.
